# Sree Sree Educational Society

> Sree Sree Educational Society (also known as Sree Sree School) is a holistic, values-based school in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh, India, established in 1987. It offers Primary, Middle and High School education combined with Yoga, Pranayama, sports and co-curricular programs.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Sree Sree Educational Society
- **Also known as:** Sree Sree School, Sree Sree School Eluru
- **Founded:** 1987 (began as Sree Sree Academy of Languages; the Society was registered in 1989)
- **Founder & Chairman:** Dr. M.B.S. Sarma (M.A. Yoga Spiritual Science, Ph.D.; M.A. English, B.Ed.)
- **Location:** Sriram Nagar, Sanivarapupeta, Eluru, Andhra Pradesh 534003, India
- **Phone:** 08812-244084
- **Email:** sreesreeeducationsociety1987@gmail.com
- **Office hours:** Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- **Students educated:** 10,000+
- **Educators:** 100+
- **Awards & honours:** 50+

## Programs & grades

- **Primary School** — Grade I to V. Play-based learning, storytelling and hands-on activities.
- **High School** — Grade VI to X. Strong academic foundations, subject mastery, and Yoga and Pranayama for holistic development.
- **Co-curricular activities** — Robotics & AI, Karate, Chess, Sports & Fitness, and Ethical (values) classes.

## What makes the school distinctive

- Holistic, values-based education that develops academics, character, discipline and creativity together.
- Daily Yoga and Pranayama for focus and well-being.
- Modern facilities: bright collaborative classrooms, a fully equipped computer lab, science labs and a spacious playground.
- A 38+ year legacy of trusted education in Eluru.

## Common questions

- **Where is the school?** Sriram Nagar, Sanivarapupeta, Eluru, Andhra Pradesh 534003.
- **How do I get admission?** Visit the campus, call 08812-244084, email sreesreeeducationsociety1987@gmail.com, or use the enquiry form on the Contact page. Admissions are open across grades.
- **What grades are offered?** Primary (I–V), Middle (VI–VIII) and High School (IX–X).
